text.content:
2
*�����������������a# me is this DAT.
# 
# par is the Par object that has changed.
# val is the current value.
# prev is the previous value.
# 
# Make sure the corresponding toggle is enabled in the Parameter Execute DAT.

def valueChange(par, val, prev):
	ownerComp = par.owner
	if par.name == 'Advanced':
		if val == 'off':
			ownerComp.par.Searchterm.enable = 1
			ownerComp.par.Name.enable = 0
			ownerComp.par.Family.enable = 0
			ownerComp.par.Type.enable = 0
			ownerComp.par.Comment.enable = 0
			ownerComp.par.Tags.enable = 0
			ownerComp.par.Text.enable = 0
			ownerComp.par.Parname.enable = 0
			ownerComp.par.Parvalue.enable = 0
			ownerComp.par.Parexpr.enable = 0
		else:
			ownerComp.par.Searchterm.enable = 0
			ownerComp.par.Name.enable = 1
			ownerComp.par.Family.enable = 1
			ownerComp.par.Type.enable = 1
			ownerComp.par.Comment.enable = 1
			ownerComp.par.Tags.enable = 1
			ownerComp.par.Text.enable = 1
			ownerComp.par.Parname.enable = 1
			ownerComp.par.Parvalue.enable = 1
			ownerComp.par.Parexpr.enable = 1
	elif par.name == 'Limit':
		if val == 'off':
			ownerComp.par.Maxdepth.enable = 0
		else:
			ownerComp.par.Maxdepth.enable = 1
	return

def onPulse(par):
	if par.name == 'Search':
		op('opfind1').par.cookpulse.pulse()
	return

def expressionChange(par, val, prev):
	return

def exportChange(par, val, prev):
	return

def enableChange(par, val, prev):
	return
